content.en:
Zhonghaiyuan.

Tianhai Mountain didn't send too many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors to guard here, and with Ye Tian's strength, he could naturally sneak in and not be discovered by them.

Soon, he entered the middle sea abyss.

The danger of the Middle Abyss is mainly a creature called the Abyssal Beast, which is composed entirely of special liquid substances, which resemble seawater, and there are countless seas within the Middle Abyss.

Once integrated into the seawater, the Abyssal Beasts were formless and insubstantial, and it was difficult for even the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor to spy on their existence.

However, this was nothing to Ye Tian, he could easily use his copying talent to find the Abyss Beast.

Although Tianhaishan occupies Zhonghaiyuan, he does not dare to break into Zhonghaiyuan often, because Zhonghaiyuan is too dangerous.

Moreover, they only dared to break through the periphery of Zhonghaiyuan, and definitely did not dare to break into the core area.

Strictly speaking, Tianhaishan is just guarding Zhonghaiyuan to prevent other forces from going to Zhonghaiyuan, and cannot snatch any resources and treasures from Zhonghaiyuan.

Ye Tian entered Zhonghaiyuan this time, mainly looking for a resource-Haiyuan Sand.

The Sea Abyss Sand is a resource that helps the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor to enhance the origin of the other side, and the effect is quite good.

But.

There are not many Haiyuan Sands, and the Origin Upper Realm of Tianhai Mountain and Pilgrimage Tianshan will occasionally go to Zhonghaiyuan to look for Haiyuan Sand, and even if there are still Haiyuan Sands on the periphery, the number will not be too much.

Ye Tian's goal is still the depths of the Middle Sea Abyss, to see if he can obtain a large amount of Sea Abyss Sand.

Entering Zhonghai Yuan, Ye Tian's copying talent unfolded.

Soon, he sensed an abyssal beast.

This Sea Abyss Beast was comparable to the top Origin Middle Realm strength, and Ye Tian did not kill it, but bypassed it.

His goal was to find the Abyssal Sands, not to kill the Abyssal Beasts.

Time passes.

Ye Tian also found the Haiyuan Sand in Zhonghaiyuan, each grain of Haiyuan Sand was equivalent to the size of a marble, and the whole body was pitch black, exuding a black light.

And the sand of the sea abyss is not found in a pile, but scattered one after another in the middle of the sea abyss.

Finding enough Abyssal Sand is time-consuming, and you have to face the threat of Abyssal Beasts.

Even Ye Tian can sense the Abyss Beast and will avoid it in time, but occasionally he has to be attacked by the Abyss Beast and is forced to fight.

Because every time he fights, he ends or flees as quickly as possible, without causing too many fluctuations, and will not let Tianhaishan find out.

"It's getting harder and harder to find the sea abyss, you have to go to the depths of the middle sea abyss to find the sea abyss!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, before going to Haiyuansha, he had to find a way to send out the Haiyuansha he had found.

So, he came out of Zhonghai Yuan and was not discovered by the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm of Tianhai Mountain.

After sending the sea abyss away, he infiltrated the middle sea abyss as the Lord of the Blood Night.

This time.

He went straight into the depths of the Middle Sea Abyss.

He wanted to see what was in danger in the depths of the Middle Sea Abyss.

Deep in the middle of the sea abyss.

After Ye Tian came in, he directly sensed an incomparably powerful sea abyss beast.

Airplanes!!!!

The massive body of the Abyssal Beast emerged from the sea and transformed into an aqua-blue giant creature.

Immediately after, countless waters surged out, turned into tides, and hit Ye Tian.

Every drop of water is like a huge world, and the endless world of water comes out of time and space.

"A sea abyss beast comparable to the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian knew very well that with his current strength, he was no match for this sea abyss beast.

So, he ran away.

Soon, he got rid of the abyssal beast.

"The depths of the Middle Abyss are really dangerous, as soon as I entered, I encountered a Sea Abyss Beast comparable to the top Origin Upper Realm, it seems that I can only copy the body of an Abyss Beast, and then advance with the body of the Abyss Beast!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

He copied the body of the Abyssal Beast here as the Lord of the Bloody Night.

However, his copy body is not a real copy body after all, and the copy talent is only an imprint, and it will take a long time to use the imprint to copy the body of the Abyss Beast, otherwise it will not be able to be copied at all.

A long time has passed.

Ye Tiancai barely copied the replica body of the Sea Abyss Beast at the peak of the Origin Middle Realm.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian's abyssal beast copied its body and entered the depths of the middle abyss to find the abyssal sand.

This time, he entered the depths of the Middle Abyss, and when he encountered other Abyssal Beasts, he would be taken by them, but he would not be attacked.

So, he slowly searched for the sand in the depths of the middle sea abyss.

I have to say that there is still a lot of sand in the depths of the middle sea abyss, much more than the periphery.

But there are also a lot of abyssal beasts that are comparable to the top Origin Upper Realm here, and such a force is also a very terrifying force in the outside world.

Even if a top-notch Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor came here, he could only escape, and once he was besieged, he would fall.

I was afraid that only the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm could sweep here, but soon he had no such idea.

this day.

He came to the depths of the Middle Abyss and saw an incomparably huge Abyssal Beast.

The body of this abyssal beast is an endless ocean, and it is a golden ocean, exuding a terrifying aura all over its body, and its body is hundreds of thousands of times the size of other abyssal beasts.

"This is the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, how can I feel many times more terrifying than the breath of the Innocent Demon Vine!"

Ye Tian was secretly shocked.

Fortunately, this sea abyss beast was sleeping, and even if Ye Tian approached, it did not cause it to drive away.

However, Ye Tian didn't dare to anger this sea abyss beast, and immediately retreated.

"The Origin Upper Realm Overlord of Chaotian Holy Mountain must know about this Sea Abyss Beast, so he doesn't dare to kill the Sea Abyss Beast here!" Ye Tian guessed.

He didn't know exactly what level of strength this sea abyss beast was, but he could definitely easily kill him countless times in seconds.

In the following days, Ye Tian was here to slowly look for Haiyuan Sand.

As the years passed, more and more sand accumulated on his body.

After a long time, Ye Tian was ready to send out a large amount of Haiyuan Sand that he had obtained.

So much sea abyss sand is enough to make his origin on the other side of the shore soar.

And the abyss beast can't get out of the copy body, this is caused by the rules of the middle abyss, otherwise, the abyss beast here won't stay here forever, and Tianhaishan doesn't dare to guard here!

So.

Ye Tian had to let his Blood Night Lord copy his body and take these sea abyss sands away.

Soon.

Ye Tian's Blood Night Lord copied his body and took away the sea abyss sand, and then left the middle sea abyss.

However.

Just when he left Zhonghaiyuan, the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor Heavenly Vessel Lord of Tianhai Mountain happened to be here in Zhonghaiyuan, and after sensing the faint fluctuation, the powerful Origin Artistic Conception extended over.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian was discovered.

No, it should be said that the Lord of the Bloody Night was discovered.
